task: Upgrade the FrankX AI Architecture hub with verified official architectures and a Vercel, Railway, and GCP deployment model.
surface: FrankX public AI Architecture field guide
audience: AI architects, technical founders, and platform leads
first_read: Build an operable agent system with one clear job for each deployment layer.

references.label: Railway deployments
references.reason: Official persistent service and worker deployment boundary

direction.signature: A precise three-stage Vercel, Railway, and GCP control-plane diagram connected to verified source architectures.

asset_quality.why_premium: Exact architecture labels, request flows, and verified links make a code-authored system diagram the correct evidence-bearing medium.

artifacts.notes: Source, lint, type, contract, and link checks pass; actual desktop and 390px Vercel exports were inspected with reduced motion enabled.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier C system-authored architecture diagram is the correct medium for exact technical labels.

checks.name: external-link-health
checks.evidence: 16 unique official documentation and GitHub links returned HTTP 200 on 2026-07-12.

checks.name: source-quality
checks.evidence: Each catalog entry links to an official maintainer-owned documentation or repository source.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: Desktop and mobile preview captures show a clear control-plane hierarchy, no overflow, no broken images, and an operable reduced-motion layout.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: The actual Vercel route was inspected at 1440x900 and 390x844, including the hero control plane, catalog cards, filters, and mobile stacking.

checks.name: production-artifact
checks.evidence: The Next.js production build completed, the Vercel preview is ready, and no route-level runtime errors were reported.

score.notes: Static hierarchy, brand fit, accessible filtering, factual accuracy, desktop/mobile composition, and production verification all meet the ship gate.

known_risks: External reference health remains time-sensitive and should continue to be checked by the existing release verifier.
